title: AgentOps check profiles (.agentops/checks.json)
description: The versioned recipe cards: a job names a profile; this file maps it to approved commands, timeouts and grading (design doc 3.6). Jobs never carry agent-authored shell text. Amendments obey the three-tier rules (3.7): appends always, declared fields only, replacement never.

checks.description: Profile name -> profile. Names are job-referencable identifiers.

timeout_minutes.description: Total profile timeout; the executor's clamp rules still apply.

commands.description: Approved commands, executed in order. NOT amendable (tier 3: replacement never). A material change is a commit to this file and a new job.

type.description: Known values today: 'exit-code' (first command's exit status), 'all-commands-pass' (every command must exit 0). Open set; core grading rules are NOT amendable.

required_capabilities.description: Capabilities this profile needs beyond the project-level set.

exclusive_resources.description: Exclusive resources (e.g. 'stellaris-game@host', 'interactive-desktop@host' classes) the run must lease.

evidence.description: Paths/globs (relative to the worktree) collected as evidence.

parameters.description: Typed parameters a job may supply via profile_parameters; undeclared parameters are a profile-resolution failure.

amendable_fields.description: Tier-2 declaration: ONLY fields named here (e.g. coordinates, operator_notes, expected_labels) accept field-level amendments. 'commands' and 'grading' are never valid entries (tier 3). Tier-1 append-only step amendments need no declaration — they are always permitted.
